title: "Felt I Was Dying": Musk Backs Claim Covid Jab Killed Thousands In Germany
summary_full: Dr Helmut Sterz, a former Pfizer toxicologist, raised concerns about how Pfizer’s Comornaty mRNA vaccine was developed and tested in a quick manner.
